response:
Emily collected 24 blueberries. David collected 15 more blueberries than Emily, so he collected 24 + 15 = 39 blueberries. David also collected three times as many as Sophia, so Sophia collected 39 / 3 = 13 blueberries. Together, they collected 24 + 39 + 13 = 76 blueberries.  

They used their blueberries to make muffins. One batch of muffins required 9 blueberries, so they made 76 / 9 = 8 batches. Each batch sold for $5, so they earned 8 * 5 = $40.  

The total amount of money they made from the blueberries they collected is $40.  

***  

The blueberries they collected were used to make muffins and brought in money. The money they made was from the blueberries they collected. The money they made was enough to cover the cost of the muffins. The money they made was enough to cover the cost of the muffins.
